name: Castanho, Klara
source_notes:
Sy Scholfield quotes her on Twitter: "meu signo é libra, nasci em 06 de outubro" (Translation: my zodiac sign is libra, i was born on 6 october) [https://twitter.com/KlaraCastanho/status/94407225438769152], "Sim... Nasci em 2000" (Yes... I was born in 2000) [https://twitter.com/KlaraCastanho/status/97056438039490561], "8:20 / 8:30 da noite" (8:20 / 8:30 at night) [https://twitter.com/KlaraCastanho/status/1051582826271961088] and "20:30h" (when asked what time she was born) [https://twitter.com/KlaraCastanho/status/1313461975800778752], "Amiga, eu sou de Santo André" (Friend, I'm from Santo André) [https://twitter.com/KlaraCastanho/status/1461524293356081153].

Larissa Nascimento pointed out that Castanho said in an interview: "Meu nome completo é Klara Forkas Gonçalez Castanho, tenho 17 anos, e nasci no dia 6/10/2000, o que faz de mim uma libriana com ascendente em Touro e lua em Aquário."

(My full name is Klara Forkas Gonçalez Castanho, I'm 17 years old, and I was born on 06/10/2000, which makes me a Libra with Taurus rising and Aquarius moon.) [https://www.google.com/amp/s/todateen.com.br/noticias/fatos-sobre-klara-castanho.phtml/amp?fbclid=IwAR1TMm036fEn6JzwQaR8W_5uF36gbNB3z5K8MD0OAHOpyIl5RjP2Vt4Zm4s].
categories: Vocation : Entertainment : TV series/ Soap star
